text.title: Internationalization (i18n) Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: code: 'You have ' + count + ' items'; breaks Russian plural rules.
antipattern.root-cause: Author didn't reach for ICU plural.
antipattern.fix: Use ICU plural: '{count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}'.

antipattern.symptom: Arabic layout has misplaced icons and reversed margins.
antipattern.fix: Use margin-inline-start/end; lint physical properties on layout components.

antipattern.symptom: Localized UI shows mixed languages — some buttons in en, others in es.
antipattern.root-cause: CI did not catch missing keys in es.json.
antipattern.fix: Add key_drift_check.py to CI; fail on missing keys.
